channel.title: Canadian Health Monitor
channel.description: Weekly Canadian EMR, EHR, digital health, privacy, cybersecurity, CIHI, Infoway, and regulatory updates.

item.title: Weekly Canadian Health Monitor Digest - 2026-07-06
item.description:
Top updates
- Data breaches in Quebec are on the rise. How safe is the province’s new digital health records system? Source: CBC Health Published: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 04:00:00 EDT Matched keywords: digital health Link: https://www.cbc.ca/player/play/9.7255477?cmp=rss
- Canadians spending more time waiting for emergency health care: CIHI Source: Global News Health Published: Fri, 26 Jun 2026 18:59:20 +0000 Matched keywords: CIHI Link: https://globalnews.ca/news/11938222/emergency-room-wait-times-cihi-report/
